BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick burn-rate analysis after Dr. Palani mentioned Coastal Conservation Fund timeline may shift. Pre-grants-office review.

CurrentState.Note: Rough estimate only. Revisit after CCF Phase III closes.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Q1 reimbursement submitted on March 31, 2027
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Reimbursement burn rate $2100/quarter; remaining budget $10,049 / $2100 = ~4.8 quarters runway.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: On track. Phase III timeline holds at Sep 30, 2027.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Worst case: CCF requires reapproval window
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Still solvent but flag to Dr. Palani for early outreach to grants office.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: CCF Phase III burn rate is on track at ~$2,100/quarter. Remaining $10,049 covers through Sep 2027 even in worst case.
ActionItems: Confirm Q1 2027 reimbursement docs with Dr. Palani by April 5
Reach out to grants office for Phase IV pre-application by June 1
